favicon.note: The browser favicon request no longer returns 404.

languagePicker.note: The language picker is now scroll-contained and the Vietnamese chip can be selected in Playwright.

pdfPrint.result: Clicking the PDF button invokes the browser print dialog; Playwright cannot complete through the native print dialog in this harness.
pdfPrint.next: If fully automated PDF download verification is required, add a server-side binary PDF renderer.
